title: DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory
description: Candidates with degrees in a science, technology, engineering, or mathematics (STEM) discipline
text:
Performance Recognition
ARL’s pay for performance (PFP) system provides an effective method for assessing, compensating, and managing the laboratory’s workforce. Employee’s annual performance evaluations are intended to ensure that top performers receive salary increases and performance awards commensurate with their achievements.
Civilian In-Processing
All new ARL employees are required to perform in-processing procedures with the organization. In an effort to expedite this process, we provide all required forms, directions, and helpful information.
